hbbc6d97ag3b5eg4238ga66eg53d0e0c0564b: She's never looked better! I'm impressed.
h977489bdg1988g4587g81d3g670539178fd4: The last time I saw a drow with red eyes, he tried to slit me open. I'm glad to see you're cut from a different cloth.
h1863ef0cg6f2cg48e0g9f66gc3e43b8acd69: Never knew drow to be the caring kind. In fact, the last drow I saw tried to slit me open. Glad to see you're different.
h4bf0de60g8f2ag47abg809eg2fdf0061b73d: And you're a grey dwarf. Never thought I'd meet a decent one, but here you stand.
h45bb344bg1720g4d68gae8cg4d4d7306d0a7: What can I do for you?
h17ac6863ge21fg44fag9312g71b19855cc65: Poor thing. She fought as hard as she could.
h862c36a3gffb6g460fg9b3egc5692819874e: It's the best any of us can do, I suppose.
h55023f76gf91bg4a63g8e36gd2ab346af61c: First you save us from goblins, then Kagha's treachery. You're making your mark.
h0963a9bcgae56g4f91ga05dg1ffc8ddacaf9: Give me a moment. I'll be right with you.
h7f927dc3g78d7g4488gaf1bgeb05906c1b21: Is there anything I can do to help?
he39f2caag92acg4c26g9f46g3577fe89792d: There. It's up to her now. Life or death.
h25892948g8f48g4988g9210g9b430966b9ac: Now, what was it you needed?
hda21aba4g452cg49d9g91b6g5a8e30cc7e8b: You found her. But I still don't know what she can do for you.
h2c51a6f3gac56g4632gbf94g05c40cd58ab1: Come here. Let's have a look at you.
h4852d446g54f4g40cag9abcg18bc4672d070: You seem healthy enough. A bit tired 'round the eyes, maybe.
h3c1c900agfba6g4318ga2f6g575cb57a501f: There is a parasite inside my head. A wriggling ghaik tadpole.
h67c86499g788cg412cg9383g40cfc5053bde: No good way of putting this. I... uh... have a tadpole in my head.
h887b7347g5260g479fga6e1g45cc427fceff: You know of them? Can you help me?
h5f500984gc80dg4bbbg8d4cge805fc1b9470: I - I'll do what I can.
hd7fdad08g8a8dg4cacg8916ga799aa424362: Come, follow me. I might be able to help.
hb43225f4g7b31g4820g8d0egcd4b0e0408cd: What other kinds are there? It's not like a frog hopped in my eye.
h3206e35ag1170g4c04gbc11gaaadc3eddf08: Actually, never mind. I'll get help elsewhere.
h44eb4622g423cg4609gbf37g7afc2e032ef1: More than tired. Something crawled into my eye.
h882c3c53g11afg4c46ga453g9d41ebd44c8c: Crawled in? Some sort of bug or - wait...
hef4526c3g6051g4a3dg9d6fg444a1a6953e6: Did it look like a tadpole? But from your worst nightmare? All slime, teeth, and tentacles?
h38817169gded2g4859gac25g23bc18bfe412: Right. Yes, I'm... very tired indeed.
h4afd623bg6ea6g40e7gb12dgba111a4413f6: Then get some rest. There's no better magic.
h4698a51cg17b0g4981g8dc5gd513d5779dfa: Take a nip of whiskey before bed if you need to. Come back to me if that doesn't do it.
h342f9b4dg813fg420fg9c96g788f5792d6ad: Do you know anything about mind flayers?
h715ebf1cgd013g49a4gac7fg7c4c9795ca77: A ghaik parasite crawled into my eye.
h3ba039ddgdc84g4366g892ag395a1e634928: I know they're nasty creatures. Can get in your head and convince you up is down.
hbd2fd5aaga105g4c5cgaaebgb020797084c1: And that's not all they'll do inside your head.
hce5fb060gf430g4d64g85bbg38650f90e82f: Tell me honestly, are you infected? Is that why you're asking?
hda709d5eg1c19g4053g8394g08c100b13f3a: No, of course not. I ask everyone that question.
h70b03e47g7cb6g489bg81adgbc1d0490160e: All right. Well, come back if you need anything.
ha1bf55beg6f36g447ag9af9gb2d248e39df0: I hear Halsin's the best healer around. I need to find him.
had1eaee9gb5a0g4647ga1e7gc5338a279650: You and every other soul here.
hf6ef6dd8g23ceg492dg8c37gc9786e1f8485: I can help if something's wrong. I'm no Master Halsin, but I can manage.
h672d8f52ga2c2g48a3gbc34g49dded97297e: I'll take whatever I can get. Heal me.
he975f2d7gcf7eg48ebgb327g885a01c7d642: What you might 'manage' probably isn't enough. I'll look elsewhere.
h55558bc6ge600g4f68g9cf9g1bd68e9d2de6: Suit yourself. I'll be here if you change your mind.
he953163fg2579g47adgb21eg4bf837677000: Just be glad my bedside manner's better than yours.
h7a1d5d90g3414g41a8g94fdga794b276fb55: Healing. I hope you're good enough to cure what ails me.
h4bbf5129g63e2g41e8g8c4dgca4c00bdabea: Good enough to tell there's nothing obviously wrong with you.
hb3c4efb9gb1ceg4685g9abegf4ca9d97f438: A bit tired, maybe. But we're all a bit tired.
hedd2a99agaf22g4703gba83g41fbbfca54ba: Do you treat people or just pets?
h4146c52dg166cg4504g8b20gb018e28f5b13: I do what I can. For most folks, that's enough.
h042be52ag6fcfg4974gac07gc28cacb6a802: So. A grey dwarf. Never thought I'd meet a decent one, but I heard what you did out there.
h45225394g7ea9g4d62gb41cg7329a75cf892: So. The last time I saw a drow, he tried to slit me open. I hope you're more agreeable.
hc5690a3eg7215g4bc2g9f5bg82820aaf99a9: A grey dwarf. Never thought I'd meet a decent one, but I heard what you did at the gates.
ha73be772gc9d5g4792ga970g99be7c92e335: Drow. Last time I saw one of you folk, he tried to slit me open. I hope you're more agreeable.
h41af7c82g57cdg475agba6ag05d86ad53a94: Where did you see another drow?
hf50435b5geceag4528g9b83g56362c2ca5b8: Look, you obviously want something. What is it?
h967003e6g779eg4373g8c75g49e1376b1052: That depends. How good of a healer are you?
h55b6d31egd42fg487cg87fagee82fe461c1e: Excuse me? I'm more important than some bird.
h10b638beg8874g4229g89c9g2820ff2adb8d: God or fieldmouse, no one's more important than the patient in front of you.
h4b25f914g6b58g4aa5g9e53g55a20ba3135a: First you save us from goblins, then you bring Kagha back from the brink. You're making your mark.
h5e09ab7bg21ebg41f1gbaacg28bcda7d3b58: I see you. Just give me a moment.
hb3e06508g057fg4bcag81fag359dce5b4c41: There something I can do for you?
h770f1235g9291g45c3g9591g5f507e15b0bb: Heard about your antics at the gate. You look well for someone that took on a troupe of goblins.
h47424e70g180eg4229gae66g20c2d6a6f6ce: How are you doing? Feeling any better?
h6f3eea22g5986g4df2g8566ge7bceb5c99e3: Now, what can I do for you?
hed6a3dc7g3c82g4b98g8c13gfa0407fd6cf0: Yes? Discovered some new ache, have you?
